zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Margery Clarell於1446年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾艾可特時，她的父親Richard Clarell20歲，母親Margaret Whittingham18歲。她於大約1460年與Thomas Andrews在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在英國享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Margery Clarell于1446年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾艾可特时，她的父亲Richard Clarell20岁，母亲Margaret Whittingham18岁。她于大约1460年与Thomas Andrews在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Margery Clarell was born in 1446, in Edgcote, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Clarell, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Whittingham, was 18. She married Thomas Andrews about 1460, in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1490, in England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Margery Clarell est née en 1446, à Edgcote, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Clarell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whittingham, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Andrews environ 1460, à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Margery Clarell 1446 in Edgcote, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Clarell 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Whittingham 18. Sie hat um 1460 in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Andrews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 44 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Margery Clarell è nata il nel 1446 nel Edgcote, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Richard Clarell, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Whittingham, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Andrews circa 1460, nel Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1490, nel England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Margery Clarellが1446年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエドグコトで生まれた時，父Richard Clarellは20歳，母Margaret Whittinghamは18歳であった。約1460年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャーウエルトンでThomas Andrewsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にイギリスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Margery Clarell(이)가 1446년 영국 노르섬프토실르 에지컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Clarell(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Whittingham(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에서 Thomas Andrews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Margery Clarell nasceu em 1446, em Edgcote, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Clarell, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whittingham, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Andrews aproximadamente 1460, em Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1490, em Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Margery Clarell родилась в 1446 г. в местности эджкот, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Clarell было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whittingham, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Andrews около 1460 г. в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Margery Clarell nació en 1446, en Edgcote, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Clarell, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Whittingham, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Thomas Andrews aproximadamente 1460, en Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1490, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
